title: Micron FY2025 CapEx Cash Flow Analysis

agent_trace.summary: [已完成] 发布美光资本支出分析征调令，明确总目标与边界约束

updates.total_target: 对美光科技FY2025财年现金流量表数据进行分析，评估其现金流生成能力是否足以支持当前资本支出周期，并判断其扩张战略的合理性。具体包括计算调整后自由现金流及其覆盖率，模拟FY2026盈亏平衡情景，并结构性分析资本支出的特点。

boundaries.data_source: 美光科技FY2025（全年）现金流量表数据。
analysis_components: 自由现金流（FCF）和覆盖率计算：使用经营现金流和净资本支出，计算FY2025调整后自由现金流，并计算资本支出覆盖率（资本支出/调整后自由现金流）。
FY2026盈亏平衡情景模拟：假设FY2026资本支出达到200亿美元，公司经营现金流利润率（OCF/营收）保持FY2025的47%水平，计算美光在FY2026需达到的营收水平以维持非负自由现金流（FCF >= 0）。
资本支出结构分析：结合“NAND晶圆产能削减10%”和“HBM后端封装设备投资”信息，分析本轮资本支出的结构特点，论证管理层在巨额支出下仍声称保持“产能纪律”的原因。
boundaries.perspective: 财务分析师视角，关注高资本支出对公司现金流的影响及扩张战略的合理性。

meta.stage_description: 大汗发布征调令并定义边界。

title: Micron FY2025 CapEx Cash Flow Analysis

agent_trace.summary: [已完成] 美光资本支出分析的万户级计划已制定，包含分解口径与回报周期。

tumen_quota.title: Micron FY2025 CapEx Cash Flow Analysis
tumen_quota.description: 基于美光科技FY2025（全年）现金流量表数据，完成以下全面分析：1. 自由现金流（FCF）及覆盖率计算；2. FY2026盈亏平衡情景模拟；3. 资本支出结构分析。目标是评估美光现金流生成能力能否支撑本轮资本支出周期，并判断其扩张策略的合理性。
tumen_quota.scope: 全面完成用户任务中要求的所有分析点。

tumen_level.name: 万户级 (Tumen-level)
tumen_level.description: 整体分析任务：Micron FY2025 CapEx Cash Flow Analysis。
tumen_level.breakdown_to_mingghan: 将整体分析任务分解为最多10个千户级子任务。

mingghan_level.name: 千户级 (Mingghan-level)
mingghan_level.description: 万户级任务分解出的主要分析模块。
tasks: 1. 自由现金流（FCF）及覆盖率计算
mingghan_level.breakdown_to_jaghun: 将每个千户级任务分解为最多10个百户级子任务，例如：'FCF计算'可分解为数据收集、FCF计算、覆盖率计算等。

jaghun_level.name: 百户级 (Jaghun-level)
jaghun_level.description: 千户级任务分解出的具体操作步骤或数据处理单元。

example_breakdown.breakdown_to_arban: 将每个百户级任务分解为最多10个十户级原子操作，例如：'收集运营现金流数据'可分解为识别报告、定位报表、提取数值等。

arban_level.name: 十户级 (Arban-level)
arban_level.description: 百户级任务分解出的最小可执行原子操作，例如：执行一次web_search获取报告URL，或从文件中读取特定数据。
arban_level.example_task: 1.1.1 识别美光FY2025官方财报文件。

arban_level_report.content: 报告具体数据点获取、计算步骤完成情况，以及遇到的微观障碍。

jaghun_level_report.content: 报告分析子项（如FCF计算）的完成状态、初步结果及遇到的主要问题。

mingghan_level_report.frequency: 双周或阶段性报告 (Bi-weekly / Milestone)
mingghan_level_report.content: 报告主要分析部分（如FCF分析、盈亏平衡模拟）的初步结论、关键发现与潜在风险。

tumen_level_report.content: 提交完整的Micron FY2025 CapEx现金流分析报告，包含所有结论、建议和支持数据。

meta.stage_description: 中枢将征调令转成万户级配额与节奏计划。

title: Micron FY2025 CapEx Cash Flow Analysis

agent_trace.summary: [Executing] Decomposed Micron CapEx analysis into 10 Mingghan sub-tasks for further execution.

mingghan_allocations.description: Retrieve Micron Technology's FY2025 full-year Statement of Cash Flows.
Extract FY2025 Operating Cash Flow (OCF) from the Statement of Cash Flows.
Extract FY2025 Net Capital Expenditures (CapEx) from the Statement of Cash Flows.
Calculate FY2025 Adjusted Free Cash Flow (FCF = OCF - Net CapEx).
Calculate FY2025 Capital Expenditure Coverage Ratio (CapEx / Adjusted FCF).
Confirm Micron's FY2026 CapEx guidance of $20 billion.
Confirm Micron's FY2025 Operating Cash Flow Margin (OCF/Revenue) of 47%.
Calculate required FY2026 Operating Cash Flow for non-negative FCF (OCF >= $20B).
Calculate required FY2026 Revenue for the required OCF, given 47% OCF margin.
Analyze Micron's FY2025 CapEx structure, including NAND capacity reduction and HBM investment, to explain 'capacity discipline'.

meta.stage_description: 万户级执行并向下分解到千户级。

mingghan_allocations.description: Retrieve Micron Technology's FY2025 full-year Statement of Cash Flows.
Extract FY2025 Operating Cash Flow (OCF) from the Statement of Cash Flows.
Extract FY2025 Net Capital Expenditures (CapEx) from the Statement of Cash Flows.
Calculate FY2025 Adjusted Free Cash Flow (FCF = OCF - Net CapEx).
Calculate FY2025 Capital Expenditure Coverage Ratio (CapEx / Adjusted FCF).
Confirm Micron's FY2026 CapEx guidance of $20 billion.
Confirm Micron's FY2025 Operating Cash Flow Margin (OCF/Revenue) of 47%.
Calculate required FY2026 Operating Cash Flow for non-negative FCF (OCF >= $20B).
Calculate required FY2026 Revenue for the required OCF, given 47% OCF margin.
Analyze Micron's FY2025 CapEx structure, including NAND capacity reduction and HBM investment, to explain 'capacity discipline'.

title: Micron FY2025 CapEx Cash Flow Analysis

agent_trace.summary: [Executing] Decomposed Micron FY2025 CapEx Cash Flow Analysis into 10 Jaghun-level sub-tasks.

jaghun_allocations.title: Extract FY2025 Operating Cash Flow
jaghun_allocations.description: Locate and extract the full-year FY2025 Operating Cash Flow (OCF) from Micron Technology's official financial statements or earnings reports.

jaghun_allocations.title: Extract FY2025 Net Capital Expenditures
jaghun_allocations.description: Locate and extract the full-year FY2025 Net Capital Expenditures (CapEx) from Micron Technology's official financial statements or earnings reports.

jaghun_allocations.title: Calculate FY2025 Adjusted Free Cash Flow
jaghun_allocations.description: Calculate Adjusted Free Cash Flow (FCF) for FY2025 using the extracted Operating Cash Flow and Net Capital Expenditures (FCF = OCF - Net CapEx).

jaghun_allocations.title: Calculate FY2025 CapEx Coverage Ratio
jaghun_allocations.description: Calculate the Capital Expenditure Coverage Ratio for FY2025 (CapEx Coverage Ratio = Net CapEx / Adjusted FCF).

jaghun_allocations.title: Summarize FY2025 FCF & Coverage Ratio Findings
jaghun_allocations.description: Compile a summary of the calculated FY2025 Adjusted Free Cash Flow and Capital Expenditure Coverage Ratio, including an initial assessment of Micron's ability to cover investment requirements.

jaghun_allocations.title: Verify FY2026 CapEx Guidance
jaghun_allocations.description: Confirm the FY2026 capital expenditures guidance of $20 billion from Micron's official statements or investor calls.

jaghun_allocations.title: Confirm FY2025 OCF Margin & Project for FY22026
jaghun_allocations.description: Confirm the FY2025 Operating Cash Flow Margin (OCF/Revenue) of 47% and state the assumption that this margin remains constant for FY2026 for simulation purposes.

jaghun_allocations.title: Calculate FY2026 Breakeven Revenue
jaghun_allocations.description: Calculate the minimum FY2026 revenue required to achieve non-negative Free Cash Flow (FCF >= 0), using the confirmed FY2026 CapEx guidance and projected OCF Margin.

jaghun_allocations.title: Research CapEx Structural Details
jaghun_allocations.description: Gather information specifically on Micron's '10% reduction in NAND wafer capacity' and 'investment in HBM back-end packaging equipment' as mentioned in the task.

jaghun_allocations.title: Analyze CapEx Discipline Justification
jaghun_allocations.description: Analyze how the structural characteristics (NAND reduction, HBM investment) support management's claim of 'capacity discipline' despite high overall expenditures.

meta.stage_description: 千户级执行并向下分解到百户级。

arban_allocations.SUMMARY: Collect Micron FY2025 Operating Cash Flow
arban_allocations.DESCRIPTION: Locate and extract Micron Technology's Operating Cash Flow for the full fiscal year 2025 from official financial reports or reliable financial data sources.

arban_allocations.SUMMARY: Collect Micron FY2025 Net Capital Expenditures
arban_allocations.DESCRIPTION: Locate and extract Micron Technology's Net Capital Expenditures for the full fiscal year 2025 from official financial reports or reliable financial data sources.

arban_allocations.SUMMARY: Calculate Micron FY2025 Adjusted Free Cash Flow
arban_allocations.DESCRIPTION: Calculate Adjusted Free Cash Flow for FY2025 using the collected Operating Cash Flow and Net Capital Expenditures (Operating Cash Flow - Net CapEx).

arban_allocations.SUMMARY: Calculate Micron FY2025 CapEx Coverage Ratio
arban_allocations.DESCRIPTION: Calculate the Capital Expenditure Coverage Ratio for FY2025 (Net Capital Expenditures / Adjusted Free Cash Flow).

arban_allocations.SUMMARY: Interpret Micron FY2025 FCF and Coverage Ratio
arban_allocations.DESCRIPTION: Analyze and provide an interpretation of the calculated Adjusted Free Cash Flow and Capital Expenditure Coverage Ratio for FY2025, assessing the company's ability to cover investment requirements.

arban_allocations.SUMMARY: Confirm Micron FY2026 Projected CapEx
arban_allocations.DESCRIPTION: Confirm the projected capital expenditures for FY2026, specifically the $20 billion guidance mentioned in the task context.

arban_allocations.SUMMARY: Confirm Micron FY2025 OCF Margin
arban_allocations.DESCRIPTION: Confirm the Operating Cash Flow Margin for FY2025, specifically the 47% level mentioned in the task context.

arban_allocations.SUMMARY: Calculate Required OCF for FY2026 Breakeven
arban_allocations.DESCRIPTION: Calculate the minimum Operating Cash Flow Micron must achieve in FY2026 to maintain non-negative Free Cash Flow, assuming FY2026 CapEx is $20 billion.

arban_allocations.SUMMARY: Calculate Required Revenue for FY2026 Breakeven
arban_allocations.DESCRIPTION: Calculate the revenue level Micron must achieve in FY2026 to maintain non-negative Free Cash Flow, using the required OCF and the FY2025 OCF Margin of 47%.

arban_allocations.SUMMARY: Analyze Micron CapEx for Capacity Discipline
arban_allocations.DESCRIPTION: Gather information on '10% reduction in NAND wafer capacity' and 'investment in HBM back-end packaging equipment.' Analyze how these structural characteristics support management's claim of 'capacity discipline' despite high capital expenditures.

arban_allocations.DESCRIPTION: Confirm the Operating Cash Flow Margin for FY2025, specifically the 47% level mentioned in the task context.

arban_allocations.SUMMARY: Calculate Required OCF for FY2026 Breakeven
arban_allocations.DESCRIPTION: Calculate the minimum Operating Cash Flow Micron must achieve in FY2026 to maintain non-negative Free Cash Flow, assuming FY2026 CapEx is $20 billion.

arban_allocations.SUMMARY: Calculate Required Revenue for FY2026 Breakeven
arban_allocations.DESCRIPTION: Calculate the revenue level Micron must achieve in FY2026 to maintain non-negative Free Cash Flow, using the required OCF and the FY2025 OCF Margin of 47%.

arban_allocations.SUMMARY: Analyze Micron CapEx for Capacity Discipline
arban_allocations.DESCRIPTION: Gather information on '10% reduction in NAND wafer capacity' and 'investment in HBM back-end packaging equipment.' Analyze how these structural characteristics support management's claim of 'capacity discipline' despite high capital expenditures.

title: Micron FY2025 CapEx Cash Flow Analysis
